verbGlossary.ORGANIZED BY: {source} structure follows {target} system's division and section hierarchy (e.g., specifications organized by MasterFormat divisions, punch lists sorted by trade division)
verbGlossary.IMPLEMENTS: {source} document implements the requirements defined in {target} corresponding section
verbGlossary.INDEXED BY: {source} sheets are indexed and numbered according to {target} division structure
verbGlossary.KEYED TO: {source} or as-built document is cross-referenced to {target} classification for consistent building-system identification
verbGlossary.TAGGED TO: {source} is linked to {target}ification for interoperability with BIM-based document management
verbGlossary.REVISES PER: {source} is issued to address changes scoped within {target} requirements
verbGlossary.AMENDS: {source} formally modifies {target} requirements before contract execution
verbGlossary.SUPPLEMENTS: Architect's supplemental instruction adds detail or clarification to {target} during construction
verbGlossary.CLARIFIES: {source} seeks clarification on ambiguous or conflicting requirements within {target}
verbGlossary.INTERPRETS: {source} provides the designer's interpretation of {target} intent
verbGlossary.SCOPED BY: {source}is defined using {target} code list to ensure bids align with the budget structure
verbGlossary.STRUCTURED PER: {source} or request is structured to follow the categories or delivery-method conventions defined by {target}
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} is mandated by {target}, which lists it as a required pre-installation deliverable
verbGlossary.EVALUATED AGAINST: {source} review assesses the proposed product or method against {target} acceptance criteria
verbGlossary.FABRICATED PER: {source} shows fabrication details that must conform to {target} material and workmanship standards
verbGlossary.FILED UNDER: {source} is filed and tracked under {target} division for organized retrieval (e.g., product data filed under MasterFormat division)
verbGlossary.VERIFIED AGAINST: {source} or document is checked against {target} acceptance criteria through independent verification
verbGlossary.FORMATTED PER: Project correspondence follows the notice and communication protocols defined in {target} documents
verbGlossary.DELIVERED PER: {source} is prepared and sent following the delivery procedures specified in {target} documents
verbGlossary.SERVED PER: {source} of delay is formally served following the contractual notice requirements in {target} provisions
verbGlossary.ISSUED PER: {source}is issued following the procedures defined in {target} document provisions
verbGlossary.CHARGED TO: Cost from a directive or task is allocated to a budget code or cost code in {target} for financial tracking
verbGlossary.CONVENED PER: {source} is held at the frequency and format required by {target} document provisions (e.g., OAC meetings per AIA A201)
verbGlossary.LOGGED PER: {source}is documented following {target} recordkeeping requirements (e.g., daily report logged per OSHA 1904 format)
verbGlossary.REPORTS ON: {source} note describes a field condition that relates to a hazard or category defined in {target} classification
verbGlossary.DIRECTS PER: {source} directs field work in accordance with {target} installation requirements
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED PER: {source} is captured following {target} documentation requirements (e.g., phone call log documenting an injury per ANSI classification)
verbGlossary.REISSUED UNDER: {source} is reissued and tracked under the affected {target} to notify impacted trades
verbGlossary.REMEDIATES UNDER: {source} addresses a finding classified under {target} hazard category
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED UNDER: {source} is assigned under {target} code for work breakdown and progress tracking
verbGlossary.CATALOGED BY: {source} is cataloged using {target} taxonomy for searchable visual documentation of building elements
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source}is dictated by the requirements of {target} code or fire standard
verbGlossary.FURNISHED PER: {source}of insurance is furnished as required by {target} document's insurance provisions
verbGlossary.ADDRESSES: {source}plan identifies and mitigates hazards defined in {target} categories
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS COMPLIANCE WITH: O&M manual includes documentation proving the installed systems comply with {target} performance requirements
verbGlossary.WARRANTED PER: {source}documentation guarantees materials and workmanship per {target} warranty provisions
verbGlossary.EXECUTED PER: {source}is executed following the procedures and format specified in {target} documents
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} metric is broken down by {target} to identify which specification areas or trades drive the most activity
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED TO: {source} metric is compared against {target} adoption rate or industry baseline to assess documentation maturity
